name: Uncooked Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potato until it is tender.
2. Mash the boiled potato.
3. While the potato is still hot, add butter, cocoa, salt, and vanilla.
4. Gradually stir in powdered sugar until the mixture forms a stiff dough.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased pan and spread it about 1 inch deep.
6. Press chopped nuts onto the top of the fudge.
7. Allow the fudge to stand for 2 hours before cutting into squares.
This recipe makes approximately 2 pounds of candy.
